name: revenuecat
description: Reads and writes RevenueCat v2 project configuration, customer, product, offering, subscription, purchase, paywall, virtual currency, integration, and metrics resources through the REST API.

risk.read: external RevenueCat API reads of project, app, product, offering, customer, subscription, purchase, paywall, virtual currency, integration, metrics, and audit-log data
risk.write: external RevenueCat API mutations that create, update, archive, delete, refund, cancel, transfer, grant, revoke, or otherwise alter project and customer resources
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive deletes/refunds/cancellations are flagged as destructive
